text:
Today, China is stand-
                                                                                                                    ing rock-firm in the family of nations as one of the most influential
                                                                                                                    countries in the world. Nonetheless, we are clearly aware that China
                                                                                                                    is still in the primary stage of socialism and needs further develop-
                                                                                                                    ment; in other words, while advanced countries have entered the era
                                                                                                                    of knowledge economy, China still busies itself with industrial and
                                                                                                                    economic development. Despite its economic achievements, China is
                                                                                                                    in face of plentiful contradictions and problems, such as: the large
